name: Kira Brightwell
title: The Brave Apprentice

physical_description.hair: Chestnut brown in a practical braid
physical_description.eyes: Bright blue eyes full of determination
physical_description.clothing: Simple traveling clothes with a scholar's cloak

catchphrases: There must be more to this story

backstory.motivation: Chosen to help recover stolen ancient texts
backstory.journey: First time leaving her peaceful village
backstory.secrets: Has an unusual ability to read magical scripts

relationships.family: Misses her parents and younger brother

character_arc.start: Sheltered village girl with dreams of adventure
character_arc.growth: Learns courage comes from helping others
character_arc.challenges: Must overcome fear to protect what she loves
character_arc.end_goal: Become a true keeper of knowledge

goals: Recover the stolen Chronicle of Seasons
Prove herself worthy of Theron's teaching
Return home safely with new knowledge
Protect her village from future threats
